ddls:
CREATE TABLE "code_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the code file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the code file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language of the code file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the code file in bytes */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modified date of the code file */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the file */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicate whether the code file is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code file the metric belongs to */,
  "nchar" INTEGER /* Number of characters in the code file */,
  "nline" INTEGER /* Number of lines in the code file */,
  "line_length_mean" REAL /* Mean line length of the code file */,
  "line_length_median" REAL /* Median line length of the code file */,
  "line_length_max" INTEGER /* Maximum line length of the code file */,
  "line_length_sd" REAL /* Standard deviation of line length in the code file */,
  "nchar_unique" INTEGER /* Number of unique characters in the code file */,
  "code_complexity" REAL /* A composite metric that combines multiple complexity measures */,
  "code_readability" REAL /* A metric that measures the readability of the code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES code_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code file the function belongs to */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function */,
  "nfunction" INTEGER /* Number of functions in the code file */,
  "nstatement" INTEGER /* Number of statements in the function */,
  "statement_nesting_min" INTEGER /* Minimum statement nesting level of the function */,
  "statement_nesting_mean" REAL /* Mean statement nesting level of the function */,
  "statement_nesting_median" REAL /* Median statement nesting level of the function */,
  "statement_nesting_max" INTEGER /* Maximum statement nesting level of the function */,
  "statement_nesting_sd" REAL /* Standard deviation of statement nesting level in the function */,
  "nparameter" INTEGER /* Number of parameters in the function */,
  "nreturn" INTEGER /* Number of return statements in the function */,
  "nlocal_variable" INTEGER /* Number of local variables in the function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_functions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES code_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_structure" (
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code structure metric */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code file the metric belongs to */,
  "ninternal" INTEGER /* Number of internal variables in the code file */,
  "nconst" INTEGER /* Number of const variables in the code file */,
  "nenum" INTEGER /* Number of enum variables in the code file */,
  "ngoto" INTEGER /* Number of goto statements in the code file */,
  "ninline" INTEGER /* Number of inline functions in the code file */,
  "nnoalias" INTEGER /* Number of noalias variables in the code file */,
  "nregister" INTEGER /* Number of register variables in the code file */,
  "nrestrict" INTEGER /* Number of restrict variables in the code file */,
  "nsigned" INTEGER /* Number of signed variables in the code file */,
  "nstruct" INTEGER /* Number of struct variables in the code file */,
  "nunion" INTEGER /* Number of union variables in the code file */,
  "nunsigned" INTEGER /* Number of unsigned variables in the code file */,
  "nvoid" INTEGER /* Number of void variables in the code file */,
  "nvolatile" INTEGER /* Number of volatile variables in the code file */,
  "ninterface" INTEGER /* Number of interfaces in the code file */,
  "nabstract" INTEGER /* Number of abstract classes or methods in the code file */,
  "nlambda" INTEGER /* Number of lambda functions in the code file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("structure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_structure_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES code_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code file the comment belongs to */,
  "ncomment" INTEGER /* Number of comments in the code file */,
  "ncomment_char" INTEGER /* Number of characters in comments in the code file */,
  "nblock_comment" INTEGER /* Number of block comments in the code file */,
  "nsingle_line_comment" INTEGER /* Number of single-line comments in the code file */,
  "comment_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of comments to code lines */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES code_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directives" (
  "directive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each directive */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code file the directive belongs to */,
  "ncpp_directive" INTEGER /* Number of C preprocessor directives in the code file */,
  "ncpp_include" INTEGER /* Number of C preprocessor includes in the code file */,
  "ncpp_conditional" INTEGER /* Number of C preprocessor conditionals in the code file */,
  "nmacro" INTEGER /* Number of macro definitions in the code file */,
  "ndefine" INTEGER /* Number of #define directives in the code file */,
  "nundef" INTEGER /* Number of #undef directives in the code file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("directive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directives_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES code_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicate whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the code file */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code file being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the code file */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or tool used to access the code file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES code_files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_file_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code file the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the code file */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_message" TEXT /* A message or description for the version */,
  "version_size" INTEGER /* Size of the code file in this version in bytes */,
  "version_hash" TEXT /* A unique hash for the version to ensure integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_file_versions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES code_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code file the metric belongs to */,
  "halstead_min" REAL /* Minimum Halstead metric value */,
  "halstead_mean" REAL /* Mean Halstead metric value */,
  "halstead_median" REAL /* Median Halstead metric value */,
  "halstead_max" REAL /* Maximum Halstead metric value */,
  "halstead_sd" REAL /* Standard deviation of Halstead metric values */,
  "design_complexity" REAL /* A metric that measures the design complexity of the code */,
  "maintainability_index" REAL /* A metric that measures the maintainability of the code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_quality_metrics_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES code_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cyclomatic_complexity" (
  "complexity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complexity metric */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code file the metric belongs to */,
  "cyclomatic_min" REAL /* Minimum cyclomatic complexity value */,
  "cyclomatic_mean" REAL /* Mean cyclomatic complexity value */,
  "cyclomatic_median" REAL /* Median cyclomatic complexity value */,
  "cyclomatic_max" REAL /* Maximum cyclomatic complexity value */,
  "cyclomatic_sd" REAL /* Standard deviation of cyclomatic complexity values */,
  "cognitive_complexity" REAL /* A metric that measures the cognitive complexity of the code */,
  "essential_complexity" REAL /* A metric that measures the essential complexity of the code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complexity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cyclomatic_complexity_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES code_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "identifier_table" (
  "identifier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each identifier */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code file the identifier belongs to */,
  "nidentifier" INTEGER /* Number of identifiers in the code file */,
  "unique_nidentifier" INTEGER /* Number of unique identifiers in the code file */,
  "identifier_type" TEXT /* Type of the identifier (e.g., variable, function, class) */,
  "identifier_scope" TEXT /* Scope of the identifier (e.g., local, global) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("identifier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_identifier_table_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES code_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_table" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code file the entity belongs to */,
  "entity" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., file, module, package) */,
  "entity_size" INTEGER /* Size of the entity in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_table_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES code_files ("file_id")
)
